kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,500) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.msg: Executing JavaScript: window.scrollBy(0,800) Without any arguments.
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${product} = Boat Rockerz 255 Neo in Ear Bluetooth Neckband with Mic with Enx Tech, Smart Magnetic Buds, ASAP Charge, Upto 25 Hours Playback, 12MM Drivers, Beast Mode, Dual Pairing (Active Black)
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Switch Window
kw.doc: Switches to browser window matching ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.msg: ${title} = Boat Rockerz 255 Neo in Ear Bluetooth Neckband with Mic with Enx Tech, Smart Magnetic Buds, ASAP Charge, Upto 25 Hours Playback, 12MM Drivers, Beast Mode, Dual Pairing (Active Black)
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Boat Rockerz 255 Neo in Ear Bluetooth Neckband with Mic with Enx Tech, Smart Magnetic Buds, ASAP Charge, Upto 25 Hours Playback, 12MM Drivers, Beast Mode, Dual Pairing (Active Black)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Scroll Element Into View
kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Boat Rockerz 255 Neo in Ear Bluetooth Neckband with Mic with Enx Tech, Smart Magnetic Buds, ASAP Charge, Upto 25 Hours Playback, 12MM Drivers, Beast Mode, Dual Pairing (Active Black)'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
